assets.summary: Academic Research Assistant: Search papers from arXiv and Semantic Scholar, extract abstracts, generate literature review, analyze citations and research trends
strategy: Search academic papers from arXiv API
Extract paper titles, abstracts, authors, years
Analyze citation counts and research trends

assets.summary: Academic Research Assistant for AI agents
assets.content: AcademicResearcher class with methods: searchPapers(query), searchArXiv(query, limit), research(topic, question), generateLiteratureReview(papers)
